title: phegopteris stegnogramme
intro: Phegopteris stegnogramme, also known as the variable fern or lesser chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris stegnogramme include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Phegopteris stegnogramme often involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
